subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon Mine horizon and drinkest the cup of Mine utterance from the hand of My bounty! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی افقی و الشارب کاس بیانی من ید عطائی اسمع ندائی من شطر سجنی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement
